problem_statement: My grades keep dropping no matter how much I revise.
I do okay in class but my exam results never reflect it.
I'm falling behind in the subjects that matter most for my future.
I can't seem to turn my effort into better marks.
I get thrown off whenever my routine suddenly changes.
I struggle to cope when plans shift at the last minute.
Uncertainty makes me freeze instead of adjust.
I cling to the way things were instead of adapting.
I have no idea what the next step in my career should be.
I've been in the same role for years and I'm not sure how to move up.
I work hard but I keep getting passed over for promotions.
I don't know what kind of job actually fits me.
I struggle to work with others and end up doing it alone.
In group work I either take over or check out completely.
I find it hard to trust teammates to do their part.
I clash with people when we have to work together.
I know what I mean but I can't get the words out clearly.
I freeze up when I have to speak in front of people.
People misunderstand me because I struggle to explain myself.
I dread any kind of presentation or public speaking.
I second-guess every decision I make.
I don't believe I'm capable of the things I want to do.
I talk myself out of opportunities before I even try.
I always assume I'll fail before I start.
I take things at face value and don't question them enough.
I jump to the first answer instead of thinking it through.
I struggle to step back and see why I keep making the same mistake.
I find it hard to weigh different sides of a problem.
I stick to what I know and never try new ideas.
I want to be creative but I always play it safe.
I never explore beyond exactly what's required.
My ideas feel dull and I can't seem to come up with anything fresh.
I agonize over even the smallest decisions.
I'm so afraid of choosing wrong that I don't choose at all.
I keep changing my mind after I've already decided.
I freeze when I have to make a call under time pressure.
Small things set me off and I overreact before I can stop myself.
When I get overwhelmed I just shut down completely.
My mood swings so fast it’s hard for people around me.
I get so frustrated that I snap at people I care about.
I'm crushed under everyone's expectations of me.
I constantly compare myself to others and come up short.
I do things to please my family, not because I want to.
I can't enjoy anything because I'm chasing approval.
I sit down to work and get distracted within minutes.
I check my phone constantly and lose my train of thought.
I can't concentrate long enough to finish anything.
My mind wanders the moment a task gets boring.
I don't really know who I am or what I want.
I feel like I'm living a life that isn't really mine.
I have no sense of what actually matters to me.
I keep changing myself to fit whoever I'm with.
I have ideas for the team but I never feel able to step up and lead.
When I'm in charge I struggle to get people to actually follow.
I try to do everything myself instead of trusting my team.
I freeze when it's my turn to take the lead on a group.
I read something three times and still can't explain it back.
I study for hours but none of it seems to stick.
New concepts take me far longer to understand than everyone else.
I take notes in class but they make no sense to me later.
I can't find the energy to start anything lately.
I used to care about my goals and now I just feel flat.
I know what I should do but I have no drive to do it.
I lose interest in things halfway through.
I never ask for what I deserve because I hate confrontation.
I can't bring myself to negotiate my salary.
I let people walk over me instead of standing up for myself.
I avoid conflict even when something really matters to me.
I hate networking and avoid it completely.
I don't know how to build professional connections.
I never follow up with people I meet.
I could use a mentor but I have no idea how to find one.
I blank out the moment an exam starts, even when I studied hard.
My heart races and my mind goes empty right before I have to present.
I freeze up in interviews and forget everything I wanted to say.
The night before a big test I can't sleep because I'm so worried about messing up.
One failure knocks me down and I can't seem to get back up.
When I get rejected I want to give up entirely.
Setbacks hit me so hard I struggle to try again.
I take mistakes so personally that I stop trying.
I find it really hard to make friends.
I always feel like I'm on the outside looking in.
I feel lonely even when I'm surrounded by people.
I want to connect with people but I don't know how.
I put everything off until the last minute and then panic.
I keep missing deadlines even when I have plenty of time.
I make a plan every week and never stick to it.
I waste hours and then wonder where the day went.
